name: Quaker's Tantalizing Baked Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Quaker Oats, uncooked (quick or old-fashioned)
2-1/2 to 3-1/2 lb Broiler-fryer chicken, cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Combine dry ingredients in a blender container or food processor bowl and cover. Blend for about 1 minute, stopping occasionally to stir.
3. Coat chicken pieces with the oat mixture, then dip into milk. Return to the oat mixture and coat again.
4. Place coated chicken on a greased jelly roll pan and drizzle with melted margarine.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 55 to 60 minutes or until juices run clear when pierced with a fork.
